focus: All 44 phonemes in word-level production (not isolated sounds anymore)
focus_ar: جميع الـ 44 صوت في كلمات كاملة (مو أصوات معزولة)
transition_note: Weeks 1-5 taught individual sounds. Week 6 transitions to producing them INSIDE real words naturally. The goal: you no longer think about individual sounds — they come automatically in words.

daily_drills.focus: Review stops + vowels in multi-syllable words
daily_drills.task: Say each word 3 times. Mark where the STRESS falls. Record yourself.
Use each word in a sentence. Record all 10 sentences.

daily_drills.focus: Review nasals + schwa in common phrases
daily_drills.task: Say each word. Notice where schwas hide. Record a paragraph using 5+ of these words.

daily_drills.focus: R and L in everyday vocabulary
daily_drills.task: These words ALL have both R and L! Say each 3 times. No Arabic /r/ anywhere.
Compound words with multiple challenging sounds. Record a story using 5+ of them.

daily_drills.focus: Full sentence fluency — all sounds flowing
sentences: I'm absolutely certain that everything is going to be fine.
My apartment is really comfortable — there's nothing I would change.
She's probably already somewhere outside, running through the morning air.
I don't usually have time for breakfast, but today is different.
Learning something new every day is the most important thing in my life.
daily_drills.task: Read each sentence 3 times. Focus on FLOW — not individual sounds. Record all 5.

daily_drills.passage: Every morning I wake up early. There is something beautiful about the beginning of a day. I usually start by going outside — the air is different, fresh, comfortable. I think about everything I want to accomplish. My apartment is nearby, but I like walking through the park. It is probably my favorite place in the world. I have been learning English for several weeks now. I can already hear the difference in my pronunciation. Nothing is impossible if you practice regularly.
daily_drills.task: Record this passage. Compare to your Week 1 Day 7 recording. Notice the improvement.
